title: OFF ingestion lead
description: A raw imported lead (DATA-05/DATA-06/D-19), NOT a fact. A lead carries field-level OFF provenance and lives outside src/_data, so the Eleventy cascade never renders it and the prebuild corpus walk never validates it as a fact. It deliberately has NO key named sources at any level, so a misplaced lead can never trip the corpus-escape guard's hasSourcedShape detector (D-19/C4). Promotion into a published SourcedValue is an explicit human step.

leadId.description: Stable identifier for the lead (for example off-3017620422003-r30).

leadType.description: off-import is a captured product snapshot; off-revision-diff records a change between two OFF revisions as an unverified reformulation lead (VRFY-10).

barcode.description: The product barcode this lead was captured for.

capturedAt.description: Date the lead was captured from Open Food Facts.

offRevision.description: The OFF rev number of the captured snapshot; two captures with different revisions form an off-revision-diff lead.

provenance.description: Dataset-level ODbL provenance for the whole lead (DATA-02).

dataset.description: The originating dataset, for example open-food-facts.

licence.description: Dataset licence identifier, for example ODbL-1.0.

url.description: Canonical URL of the captured product on the source dataset.

fields.description: Field-level provenance (DATA-06): each imported value with the OFF field it came from and its structured measure, so a later promotion carries the correct basis and the measure-mismatch is caught rather than silently merged.

path.description: The intended target path in a promoted entity (for example nutrition.sugars).

offField.description: The Open Food Facts field this value came from (for example sugars_100g).

offRevision.description: The OFF rev this specific field value was read from.

promotion.description: The human promotion state; a lead never publishes until an editor promotes it into a SourcedValue.

status.description: Promotion workflow state; defaults to pending.

note.description: Editor note on the promotion decision.

promotedTo.description: The entity path or id the lead was promoted into, or null while pending.

by.description: Who promoted the lead, or null while pending.

date.description: Date of promotion, or null while pending.

oneOf.description: For an off-revision-diff lead: the two OFF revisions compared and the fields that changed. Phase 2 records the diff; it does NOT build an automated differ.

revisionDiff.description: Nullable; populated only for off-revision-diff leads.
